name: memory-writer
description: Passes upstream output through and injects a __memory_write__ key so the engine auto-persists it to actor memory. Configure MEMORY_KEY (default: 'work_context') and MEMORY_TYPE (default: 'semantic'). Use as the last node in a pipeline to persist summarized data.

MEMORY_KEY.description: Key under which the data is stored in actor memory

MEMORY_TYPE.description: Memory type: semantic (permanent), episodic (7d), working (1h), scratchpad (24h)
